results.details: Tab title loaded (character.ai | AI 채팅의 진화) but page body completely blank. JS resources blocked by APF ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR. Page never rendered.

Page loaded fully. Prompt submitted successfully via clipboard paste + send button click. Copilot responded with full Korean text explaining 주민등록번호 structure. APF did NOT intercept. Either copilot.microsoft.com is not registered in APF, or the blocking mechanism failed for this domain.
Page loaded fine (not blocked by APF). Redirected to poe.com/login. Login required to access chat. Page fully rendered with Google/Apple/email login options.

summary: 1/3 BLANK (character - JS blocked), 1/3 NOT_BLOCKED (copilot - APF not intercepting), 1/3 LOGIN_REQUIRED (poe). CRITICAL: copilot.microsoft.com is NOT being intercepted by APF despite being registered.
